channel.title: My Customized Papers - Last 24 Hours
channel.description: Research papers from the last 24 hours, filtered by keywords

item.title: [Recent Articles in Phys. Rev. B] Identify the switching of ${V}_{\mathrm{O}3}$ and ${V}_{\mathrm{O}4}$ and its effect on ferroelectric hafnia
item.description:
Author(s): Sida Li, Zihe Wang, Tingxiao Xie, Chuang Xue, Yufeng Xue, Qian Yin, Tongcai Yue, Junwen Yin, Tengfei Cao, Gilberto Teobaldi, Qi Hu, and Li-Min Liu

$\mathrm{Hf}{\mathrm{O}}_{2}$ thin films are recognized as pivotal materials for next-generation ferroelectric memories, and extensive experimental efforts have been dedicated to defect-engineering $\mathrm{Hf}{\mathrm{O}}_{2}$-based systems towards tailored ferroelectric properties. However, the mi…


[Phys. Rev. B 113, 134109] Published Mon Apr 13, 2026
item.author: Recent Articles in Phys. Rev. B
